title: llm/skills project configuration
description: Project-level configuration for the llm/skills Composer plugin, stored at <project-root>/skills.json. When present, this file shadows the inline extra.skills block in composer.json. See https://github.com/roxblnfk/skills for full documentation.

$schema.description: Optional pointer to this schema for IDE/editor support. Ignored by the mapper.

target.description: Destination directory for synced skills, relative to the project root. Default: .agents/skills.

aliases.description: Additional paths created as symlinks (POSIX) or junctions (Windows) pointing at the target. Each entry must be a non-empty string. No entry may equal target or duplicate another entry (after lexical normalisation).

trusted.description: Replaced by dependencies.composer.trusted; read as an alias, auto-migrated by skills:update. Packages or vendor patterns allowed to ship skills into this project. Each pattern is either an exact name like "vendor/package" or a wildcard like "vendor/*". Bare vendor names (no slash) are rejected.

trusted-replace.description: Replaced by dependencies.composer.trusted-replace; read as an alias, auto-migrated by skills:update. When true, the project's trusted list completely replaces both the built-in trusted vendors and the implicit direct-dependency trust. Default: false (project list extends the implicit sources).

discovery.description: When true, packages without an explicit extra.skills.source block are still considered as donors if they ship a top-level skills/ directory. CLI --discovery overrides this.

auto-sync.description: When true (default), the plugin runs skills:update automatically after every composer install/update via post-install-cmd / post-update-cmd. Suppressed by --no-scripts.

path-from-root.description: The project's own location relative to an intended outer containment root, e.g. "packages/api" in a monorepo. When set, target and aliases are resolved against (and confined to) that root instead of the project directory, after verifying the declared suffix matches the real project location. Must be a relative path with plain segments (no "."/".."). Omit to confine writes to the project root.

local.description: Replaced by dependencies (bool values map one-to-one); read as an alias, auto-migrated by skills:update. Per-local-provider on/off toggles. Keys must come from the locked vocabulary (composer, npm, go). Absent keys fall back to per-provider defaults: composer enabled, others disabled until their provider implementation lands.

composer.description: Enable the Composer/Packagist local donor provider. Default: true.

npm.description: Enable the npm local donor provider (future). Default: false.

go.description: Enable the Go modules local donor provider (future). Default: false.

dependencies.description: Per-package-manager configuration: how each manager's installed dependency tree becomes a skill donor, and its trust list. Keys come from the locked vocabulary (composer, npm, go). Each value is a boolean toggle (short form: enable/disable the walk) or a configuration object.

composer.description: Composer/Packagist dependencies. Trust patterns use the vendor/pkg grammar: exact "vendor/package" or wildcard "vendor/*"; bare vendor names (no slash) are rejected.

npm.description: npm dependencies (provider forthcoming). Trust patterns target npm names: bare package ("lodash"), scoped package ("@scope/pkg"), or scope wildcard ("@scope/*"). Grammar is documented but not enforced until the provider lands.

go.description: Go module dependencies (provider forthcoming). Trust patterns target module paths: prefix patterns like "github.com/owner/mod" or "github.com/owner/*". Grammar is documented but not enforced until the provider lands.

sources.description: Explicit donor sources. Each entry tells the provider what to fetch and from where: an adapter id in `from`, an identifier in `package` or `url`, and optional `host`/`ref`/`skills`/adapter-specific extras.

remote.description: Renamed to sources; read as an alias, auto-migrated by skills:update.

dependencyManagerConfig.description: Per-manager configuration object. enabled toggles the dependency-tree walk; trusted extends the manager's trust list; trusted-replace makes trusted fully replace the built-in and direct-dependency trust.

enabled.description: Walk this manager's installed dependency tree for donors. Absent → per-manager default (composer true; npm/go false until their providers land). Configuring trusted does not implicitly enable the walk.

trusted.description: Trust patterns for this manager. Extends the built-in per-manager list and the direct-dependency implicit trust.

trusted-replace.description: When true, this manager's trusted list fully replaces both its built-in list and its direct-dependency implicit trust. Default: false.

dependencyManagerConfigComposer.description: Composer per-manager configuration object. Identical to dependencyManagerConfig except trusted patterns are enforced against the vendor/pkg grammar.

enabled.description: Walk the installed Composer dependency tree for donors. Absent → true. Configuring trusted does not implicitly enable the walk.

trusted.description: Composer trust patterns: exact "vendor/package" or wildcard "vendor/*"; bare vendor names (no slash) are rejected.

trusted-replace.description: When true, the Composer trusted list fully replaces both the built-in list and the direct-dependency implicit trust. Default: false.

sourceByPackage.description: Donor source entry for name-based adapters (github, gitlab, bitbucket, composer, npm, go, skills.sh).

host.description: Full URL of the registry / API host (private Packagist, GitHub Enterprise, self-hosted GitLab, …). Absent → adapter default.

ref.description: Adapter-specific version pin (^1.2.3, v1.2.3, main, full SHA). Absent → adapter resolves the latest stable tag, falling back to the default branch HEAD.

skills.description: Optional allowlist of skill directory names to sync from this donor. Absent / omitted → sync every skill the donor ships. A non-empty list keeps only those skills. An empty list ([]) keeps the donor registered but pulls no skills from it (useful for staging or a temporary opt-out without deleting the entry). Names that do not exist in the fetched archive surface as -v warnings without aborting the run.

sourceByUrl.description: Donor source entry for URL-only adapters (http, zip).

skills.description: Optional allowlist of skill directory names to sync from this donor. Absent / omitted → sync every skill the donor ships; empty list → donor is registered but no skills are pulled (matches `sourceByPackage` semantics).

sourceByDir.description: Donor source entry for the path-based adapter (dir): a local directory declared as an explicit donor. url/host/ref are not applicable — the PHP mapper rejects them; the oneOf dispatch on the from enum keeps documents honest without an additionalProperties constraint here.

path.description: Filesystem path to the donor directory. Relative paths resolve from the project root; absolute paths (including Windows drive letters) are honoured as-is. ".." segments and locations outside the project root are allowed — a sources entry is an explicit act of trust.

package.description: Optional donor package-name override. Absent → derived from the directory's own composer.json name, falling back to <parent>/<basename> of the resolved path (lowercased).

skills.description: Optional allowlist of skill directory names to sync from this donor. Absent / omitted → sync every skill the donor ships; empty list → donor is registered but no skills are pulled (matches `sourceByPackage` semantics).
